description: CompositionNavy blue top made of stretchy 60% cotton and 40% modal, has long sleeves with elasticated sleeve hems, a double neckline with three button mock placket and light gathers on the upper neckline and brand tag at elasticated hemFitRegularWash careWash at 30 degrees with similar colours inside outPull into shape after washingDo not bleach, tumble dry or dry cleanIron lowA great casual wear option from s.oliver. The double neckline of this long sleeve top draws the eye up towards your face for a flattering look while the soft fabric means you'll look great without sacrificing comfort.Model statisticsThe product is a size 36 on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
